name: Quarter Turn toRight
preceding_figure_names: Closed Impetus, Fish Tail, Forward Lock, Hover Corte, Natural Spin Turn, Progressive Chasse, Progressive Chasse To Right, Quarter Turn to Right, Running Finish, Tipple Chasse To Right, Tipsy To L
following_figure_names: Running Right Turn, Natural Turn And Back Lock, Natural Pivot Turn, Natural Spin Turn, Natural Turn With Hesitation, Natural Turn, Forward Lock, Fish Tail, Quick Open Reverse (after 6-8 of V6 overturned to LOD), Four Quick Run (at corner, LF back with Lady OP, TH, S, into Four Quick Run), Tipsy To L (into 2-5 Back Lock down LOD), Six Quick Run (LF back with Lady OP, TH, S, into Six Quick Run)
notes:
For side leading position: low center (hip, belly button area) is turned ~ 1/8 relative to feet, then upper body (sternum) is turned another 1/8.

steps.action: LF back, Backing DC, TH, CBM, start to rise e/o 1, NFR
RF back, R side leading, Backing DC, T, continue to rise on 2 and 3
LF crosses in front of RF, Backing DC, T
RF back, Backing DC, TH, Up. Lower e/o 4
LF back in CBMP, Backing DC, TH, start to rise e/o 5, NFR
RF back, Backing DC, T, start to turn L, CBM, continue to rise on 6
LF to side and slightly fwd, Point DW, TH, 1/4 between 6-7, Body turns less, Up. Lower e/o 8
RF fwd in CBMP, OP, Facing DW, H, CBM
RF fwd, Facing DC, HT, CBM, start to rise e/o 1
comments: Often the last step of previous figure.

steps.action: LF fwd L side leading, Facing DC, T, continue to rise on 2 and 3
comments: Left side leading doesn't mean power comes from left side. It means left side is in front of the body.

steps.action: RF crosses behind LF, Facing DC, T
LF fwd, preparing to step OP, Facing DC, TH, Up, Lower e/o 4
RF fwd in CBMP, OP, Facing DC, HT, Start to rise e/o 5
LF fwd, Facing DC, T, start to turn L, CBM, Continue to rise on 6
comments: Take head and spine to left foot to make the turn. Don't shape too eager/early which will pull the Man.

steps.action: RF to side and slightly back, Backing DW, TH, 1/4 between 6-7, Body turns less, Up. Lower e/o 7
comments: Shape head to right on QQ (step 5 and 6) and return head to normal on last S.

steps.action: LF back in CBMP, Backing DW, T, CBM
